title: Scan Dashboard Run buttons invoke scripts with no parameters via & $scriptPath
description: Show-ScanDashboard.ps1 line ~248 invokes each scan script using '& $scriptPath' with no arguments. The scripts (Invoke-PSEnvironmentScanner, Invoke-ScriptDependencyMatrix, etc.) each accept optional -WorkspacePath, -ReportPath, -TempPath parameters and auto-detect them from $PSScriptRoot. When invoked via & from the dashboard, $PSScriptRoot resolves correctly to the scripts/ directory, so the auto-detection works. However, the Invoke-PSEnvironmentScanner.ps1 launches its own GUI (ShowDialog) which blocks the dashboard form — this is a UX issue, not a CommandNotFoundException. The actual CommandNotFoundException risk is mitigated by each script's self-contained design.
detection_method: Manual code review of scan dashboard Run button event handler

attempts.notes: No automated fix. Remedy instructions: No remedy defined
